ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Samuel Merritt, Esq, [but not in California] Executor in propia persona (appearing by video conference)

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Merritt reports on the status of the estate, noting that the preparation of the accounting has been somewhat more problematic than he anticipated, notwithstanding the retention of a paralegal to prepare the accounting. That said, he now believes that he may be able to prepare the Petition for Final Distribution on waiver of accounting based upon his reading of the California Probate Code and that the Petition, less the accounting, is essentially ready to go.

After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to December 5, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. on Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Singh. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Oct-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt, via Zoom, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

The court recalls the proceedings from the previous hearing in this matter and queries Mr. Merritt regarding the status of the estate. Mr. Merritt reports that he has hired a paralegal who is assisting with a petition and requests a continuance of one month.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt, via Zoom, in propria persona, Executor.

Mr. Merritt offers an update to the court as to the status of the estate reporting that the sale of the real property has closed, and that all non-real estate property is liquid, and the proceeds of the sale are in a Charles Schwab account. Mr. Merritt reports of the difficulties he's encountered with formatting an accounting and advises that he intends to contact an attorney for assistance. The court advises Mr. Merritt that the court has a list of contact information for probate paralegals who may be able to assist him, and he is advised that the courtroom clerk will send him the list via email.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Aug-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To May-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Merritt stated that he got the accounting to the referee a couple of weeks ago, that on Monday he received a response from the referee asking him to rearrange the formatting in some of the items in the accounting, that she indicated that she will be working on the appraisal of the co-op and that she asked him to request a 4 to 5-week extension. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to April 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Executor.

Mr. Merritt reports that he has submitted the Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A") to the probate referee. He also reports that there are some coins that require appraisal which he is working on and hopes to report their value to the referee soon and that the real property is currently on the market and that he hopes to have the I&A ready to file within the next few weeks.

After additional discussion, the Status on Filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Feb-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Continued To Nov-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt appeared in Propria Persona.

Mr. Merritt stated that he came out to California, that he got everything cleaned out, that he hired a contractor, that a new floor was put in and that the place was painted. Mr. Merritt also stated that the Realtor will handle getting a new stove and that the goal is to get a higher value for the property. The Court explained the role of the Probate Referee. Mr. Merritt stated that he got the inventory forms, that he has spoken with Ms. Simon (Referee) and that it was his understanding that it was better to do everything all at once. The Court explained that the purpose of having an inventory and appraisal filed is so that the beneficiaries have the ability to express any concerns they may have with respect to the value that is given to the property. Mr. Merritt stated that he understands and that he can get the inventory and appraisal done as the property is right now. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to November 29, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying Mr. Merritt regarding when he expects to have a Final Inventory and Appraisal filed. Mr. Merritt reports that he has completed many tasks including securing a brokerage and bank account and marshalling estate related debt. He also reports that the property located in San Francisco requires work which he intends to do himself in preparation to list and sell the property and requests a continuance accordingly.

After additional discussion, the Status of Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is continued to August 18, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To May-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there a question as to whether or not the Personal Representative received notice of this hearing date. The Court will issue an order continuing today's hearing on status of filing of the inventory and appraisal to May 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Merritt appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that there are no objections. The Court waives the defect in the petition at item 2A and presumes that Ivey Graham is the same person as Ivey Peterson named in the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 9, 2019 is admitted to probate. Samuel Merritt is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
